faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in Sutton Place?
faqs.answer: Flea treatment in Sutton Place ranges from $350 to $650, depending on the size of your apartment or home, the severity of the infestation, and whether multiple treatments are needed. We provide free inspections and transparent pricing for all Sutton Place properties.

faqs.question: How long does flea treatment take to work in my Sutton Place apartment?
faqs.answer: Most flea treatments show significant results within 24-48 hours, with complete elimination typically achieved within 2-3 weeks. This timeframe accounts for treating all flea life stages, including eggs and larvae. Follow-up treatments may be recommended for severe infestations to ensure all fleas are eliminated.

faqs.question: Is flea treatment safe for my pets and family in Sutton Place?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products that are safe for both pets and children when applied by our licensed professionals. We recommend keeping pets and family members away from treated areas for 2-4 hours after application. Our technicians will provide specific safety instructions tailored to your household.

faqs.question: Do you offer same-day flea treatment in Sutton Place?
faqs.answer: Yes, we understand that flea infestations require urgent attention and often offer same-day or next-day service in Sutton Place. Contact us early in the day for the best availability, and our team will prioritize your flea emergency to restore comfort to your home as quickly as possible.
